news.paragraph: Investors are closely watching Nvidia's upcoming earnings report, with the options market signaling potential volatility. Recent headlines suggest that Nvidia, along with other semiconductor and AI-related stocks, may be part of a crowded trade that has recently flashed a sell warning. This context is crucial for options traders as they consider positions ahead of the earnings announcement.
